nodes.text: Durable foundations are verified; the process model and board come next.

content.title: Homun Flow
content.body:
<!-- roadmap-slug: homun-flow -->

Turn recurring work into a visible process that people and Homun can complete, review and hand over together.

## Why now

Small teams need reliable process continuity without specialist automation staff.

## First release

- Processes with explicit activities and dependencies
- A lightweight board derived from canonical process state

## Milestones

- [x] Durable task and approval foundations
- [ ] Visible process board

## Not included yet

- General third-party workflow development

## Strategic role

The reusable foundation for every official business workflow developed next.

nodes.text: Evaluating pilot teams and the minimum repeatable process definition.

content.title: Client Work
content.body:
<!-- roadmap-slug: client-work -->

From a client request to a researched, reviewed and approved deliverable.

## Why now

Service teams already combine messages, research, documents, review and approvals.

## First release

- Process template
- Connected-tool setup

## Milestones

## Not included yet

- A delivery commitment before a pilot is selected

## Strategic role

Recommended first vertical pilot.

## Target team

Agencies, consultants and small service companies.

## Example process

- Request
- Brief
- Research
- Draft
- Review
- Approval
- Delivery
- Follow-up

## Likely connected systems

- Email
- Documents and cloud drives

## Expected output

A reviewed client deliverable with evidence and approval history.
